strategy.name: dual-momentum
strategy.status: PAPER — pending backtest validation and 3-month paper period
strategy.description: Monthly rotation between SPY/EFA based on 12-month total return, with AGG as safety position when both risk assets are below cash (BIL).

why_this_works.edge: Cross-sectional momentum (relative strength) is one of the most robust factor anomalies in the literature, documented since Jegadeesh & Titman 1993. Absolute momentum (trend following) protects against drawdowns.
why_this_works.not_overfit: Only 3 parameters: lookback period (252d), safety asset (AGG), cadence (monthly). No per-stock tuning.
why_this_works.risk_management: Flight to safety (AGG or BIL) when both equity regions are below cash prevents deep drawdowns in bear markets.
